message:
feat(fp-columnar): add Column quantile/mode/memory_usage parity (frankenpandas-4mts)

Three Column methods rounding out the descriptive-stats / memory
introspection surface:

- quantile(q) — linear-interpolation quantile via fp-types::nanquantile;
  returns Null(NaN) for empty column or q outside [0, 1].
- mode() — all non-missing values tied for the highest frequency,
  ascending-sorted; empty / all-missing → empty same-dtype column.
- memory_usage(deep) — fixed-width bytes per element plus a bit-per-
  element validity mask; when deep=true, Utf8 columns additionally
  count the sum of string byte lengths (matches pd.Series.memory_usage).

Co-lands frankenpandas-zkt0 (mode) and 45l0 (memory_usage).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
